'''Saricia''' was a [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] crewmember of the ''[[Star's Delight]]''. He had one broken horn and several missing teeth. He and the rest of the crew of the ''Delight'' were captured on [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]] by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] after trying to sell parts of a [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]]. The crew was [[Great Evacuation|rescued]] and escaped the Imperials with the help of [[Dynba Tesc]] and [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]].<ref name="MC" />
